title: Relative End Portals: Immersive Portals Edition
description: Adds new immersive portals, nether-like, portals from the overworld to end, and nether to end, and back. As well as some related advancements.
body:
A datapack that adds new, nether portal-like, portals from the end too the overworld, and the end too the nether. 1 block in the end is 16 in the overworld. 1 block in the end is 8 in the nether. 

For the end too overworld portal, make a frame out of end stone bricks, and throw a eye of ender into it. 

For the nether, make a frame of end stone bricks in the nether, and throw a eye of ender into it, or make a frame of crying obsidian in the end, and throw a eye of ender into it. 

There is 3 new advancements too get in the end tab as well. Enjoy!
